    U

    updatedAt - Variable in class model.Issue
    Timestamp indicating the last time the issue was updated.
    updateFrom(Issue) - Method in class model.Issue
    Updated current issue on fields with different values compared to the parameter
    User - Class in model
    Represents a user in the system with basic profile information, unique identifier, creation and activity timestamps, and a list of roles.
    User(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class model.User
    Constructs a new User with the specified name, surname, and username.
    UserAlreadyExistsException - Exception Class in model
    Custom exception for signalizing that such user already exists in the database
    UserAlreadyExistsException(String) - Constructor for exception class model.UserAlreadyExistsException
     
    UserFullRecord - Record Class in model
     
    UserFullRecord(String, String, String, String, String, String, Set) - Constructor for record class model.UserFullRecord
    Creates an instance of a UserFullRecord record class.
    UserListRecord - Record Class in model
     
    UserListRecord(String, String, String) - Constructor for record class model.UserListRecord
    Creates an instance of a UserListRecord record class.
    UserManager - Class in model
    Class holding all users
    UserManager() - Constructor for class model.UserManager
     
    username - Variable in class model.User
    Username used for login or identification.
    username - Variable in record class model.UserFullRecord
    The field for the username record component.
    username - Variable in record class model.UserListRecord
    The field for the username record component.
    username() - Method in record class model.UserFullRecord
    Returns the value of the username record component.
    username() - Method in record class model.UserListRecord
    Returns the value of the username record component.
    usernameExists(String) - Method in class model.UserManager
    Checks if the username exists in the database of users
    UserRole - Enum Class in model
    Enum holding user role
    UserRole() - Constructor for enum class model.UserRole
     
    users - Variable in class model.UserManager
    The set of all users managed by this manager.
    UserServlet - Class in com.example.bugtracker50
    UserServlet handles GET requests to retrieve details of the currently logged-in user.
    UserServlet() - Constructor for class com.example.bugtracker50.UserServlet
     
    UsersListServlet - Class in com.example.bugtracker50
    UsersListServlet handles GET requests to retrieve the list of all users in JSON format.
    UsersListServlet() - Constructor for class com.example.bugtracker50.UsersListServlet
     
    UserTest - Class in tests
     
    UserTest() - Constructor for class tests.UserTest
